data.title: PureCycle Gains From First-Mover Advantage And Unique Recycling Technology, Analyst Highlights Expansionary Moves
data.description: Cantor Fitzgerald analyst initiates coverage on PureCycle Technologies, with an Overweight rating and a price forecast of $14.

data.title: Avadel Obtains FDA Nod for Label Expansion Of Narcolepsy Drug Lumryz
data.description: Avadel Pharmaceuticals plc (NASDAQ:AVDL) announced that the FDA has approved its supplemental new drug application (sNDA) seeking label expansion of Lumryz.

data.title: After US Senator, Unions Urge Federal Trade Commission To Block Novo's $16.5B Acquisition Of Catalent
data.description: Public interest groups are urging the FTC to block Novo Holdings' $16.5 billion acquisition of Catalent, citing concerns over reduced competition in critical areas like diabetes, obesity treatments, and gene therapy.

data.title: Why Warren Buffett Loves Occidental Stock And What It Means For Chevron
data.description: Occidental Petroleum Corp. (NYSE: OXY) is down 13.4% in 2024 and over 20% in the last 12 months. However, that hasn't seemed to bother Warren Buffett one bit. His Berkshire Hathaway Inc.

data.title: After Failed Confirmatory Trial, Gilead Withdraws US Accelerated Approval Of Trodelvy As Bladder Cancer treatment
data.description: Gilead Sciences is set to withdraw Trodelvy's accelerated approval for metastatic urothelial cancer following unsatisfactory results from the TROPiCS-04 study. However, the decision does not impact Trodelvy's other approved uses.
